description: Mountainous heartland including Kabul, Bamyan, and the historic corridors linking north and south.
Fertile plains and ancient cities along the Amu Darya, including Balkh and the northern Silk Road.
Silk Road crossroads around Herat, desert frontiers, and remote highlands including Ghor and Badghis.
Historic southern heartlands including Kandahar and Helmand, shaped by desert routes and river valleys.
Rugged eastern valleys and passes bordering Pakistan, including Jalalabad and the forested provinces.
